title: Verify existing implementation of Breadcrumb component
description: The Breadcrumb component already exists at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx with props items: { label: string; href?: string }[]. The active item (last) renders as plain text via <span>, other items render as Next.js <Link> components. Unit tests exist at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx covering: rendering all items, last item as span, non-last items as links, single item, and default href fallback. CSS module also exists.
existing_patterns: src/components/ui/ — UI component pattern with co-located .test.tsx and .module.css files
